positive: A vibrant and symmetrical stylized design featuring a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) amidst glowing nebula clouds and crescent moons. The fox is depicted with elegant, flowing lines and mystical energy trails. The composition should be highly symmetrical, focusing on a central, powerful figure. Use a deep indigo and cosmic purple color palette contrasted with brilliant gold and teal accents. Style: Neo-Japanese woodblock print mixed with vaporwave ethereal geometry. The design must be isolated on a solid white background for optimal apparel printing. Minimalistic details, strong outlines, perfect central symmetry, high contrast, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, poorly drawn, messy lines, low contrast, solid background, realistic, photorealism, grain
